Study
Reimagined

Turn any material into quizzes, flashcards, and AI summaries. Master concepts faster than ever.

Features

Everything you need to
ace every exam

AI-Generated Quizzes

Paste your notes. Get a full quiz in seconds. Our AI understands context, creates targeted questions, and adapts to your level.

Smart Summaries

Extract the essence of any material. Key concepts, definitions, and relationships — distilled into crystal clear summaries.

Adaptive Flashcards

Spaced repetition that actually works. Cards reappear at the perfect moment — right before you forget.

Pinpoint Weak Spots

Identify exactly which topics you struggle with. Focus your time where it matters, skip what you already know.

How it works

Three steps to
mastery

01

Upload Your Material

Drop in your lecture notes, textbook pages, or any study content. PDF, text, images — we handle it all.

02

AI Does the Heavy Lifting

Our AI analyzes your content, identifies key concepts, and generates quizzes, flashcards, and summaries.

03

Study & Master

Review with adaptive tools that learn how you learn. Track progress and master every concept.

study smarter

Credits never expire. Use them at your own pace.
